name: Palayan Resources, Inc.
summary: Palayan Resources, Inc., an exploration stage company, engages in the acquisition, exploration, and development of mineral properties. The company explores for gold and silver ores. It holds a 100% interest in the Palayan Gold Claim property that consists of 8-unit claim blocks covering an area of approximately 82.7 hectares in Nueva Ecija, the Philippines. The company was founded in 2013 and is headquartered in Windermere, Florida.
